name: Rindfleisch-Eintopf (Beef Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the shortening in a Dutch oven.
2. Add the meat and brown on all sides.
3. Place the onions on top of the meat.
4. Mix the flour and seasonings with 1/4 cup water separately.
5. Blend the mixture with the tomatoes.
6. Add the blended mixture to the Dutch oven.
7. Bake at 325 degrees F for about 2 hours, until the meat is fork-tender.
8. Serve with oven-browned potatoes.
